title: ourisia polyantha
intro: Ourisia polyantha, also known as the New Zealand gentian or gentianella, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Ourisia polyantha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal benefits, although its usage should be guided by a qualified practitioner due to potential interactions with medications.
